summary: Purchase Module Enterprise Testing - Iteration 32. All 16 backend tests PASSED. Full purchase flow verified: Create PO -> Submit -> Receive -> Auto AP Creation -> Auto Journal Creation -> Payment -> Price History. Frontend UI fully functional with 6 tabs.

issues: Minor console warning about span inside option element - not blocking but should be cleaned up

BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_03_get_purchase_order_detail: PASS - Retrieved PO detail with items
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_04_submit_purchase_order: PASS - Submitted PO, status changed to 'ordered'
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_06_verify_ap_created: PASS - AP records found with AP-PO format
BACKEND_API_TESTS.test_filter_po_by_status_received: PASS - Filter by received status working

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tab_pesanan_pembelian: PASS - Shows 10 POs with status badges
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tab_daftar_hutang: PASS - Shows 5 AP records with AP-PO format
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.create_po_modal: PASS - Modal opens with supplier dropdown, product search, item table

purchase_order_flow.create_po: Working - Creates PO with supplier, items, credit terms
purchase_order_flow.receive_po: Working - Updates stock, creates AP, creates journal

ap_integration.auto_ap_creation: Working - AP auto-created on receive with is_credit=true
ap_integration.ap_format: AP-PO{number} format linking to source PO
ap_integration.ap_fields: Amount, paid_amount, due_date, status all correct

journal_integration.auto_journal_creation: Working - Journal entry created on receive

price_history.auto_recording: Working - Price recorded on each receive
price_history.fields: supplier, po_number, product, unit_cost, quantity, discount

payments.create_payment: Working - Links to PO with amount, method, reference

returns.create_return: Working - Links to PO with items and quantities

critical_code_review_comments: purchase.py line 246 uses 'uuid' without proper import - uses fallback timestamp-based ID which works but could be cleaner
PurchaseModule.jsx supplier dropdown generates console warning about span in option element - minor issue

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 tabs and modals verified working

seed_data_creation: Created test POs (PO000007-PO000010), payments (PAY2026031117...), returns (RTN2026031117...) during testing. These can be cleaned up if needed.

All tabs functional: Pesanan Pembelian, Daftar Pembelian, History Harga, Daftar Hutang, Pembayaran Hutang, Retur Pembelian.
